message:
fix(tailer): correct backpressure test to properly trigger timeouts

Fix the supervisor_backpressure_records_timeout test which was
flaky due to race conditions:

- Use CountingSource with configurable delay instead of FixedSource
- Set source delay longer than send_timeout to reliably trigger timeout
- Keep receiver alive to prevent ChannelClosed (vs timeout) error
- Add comments explaining the timing requirements

The test now reliably verifies that backpressure is recorded when
the channel send times out due to full capacity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
